raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates improving the contribution framing and theoretical-to-empirical thesis above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains an apparent contradiction between the claimed monotone decrease in iteration count and the reported increasing iteration counts, making logical consistency load-bearing.","R1.3":"The empirical claims must align with the reported table values and spectral-radius estimates, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.","R1.6":"A stronger version would normally require clearer, more precise, and less overstated prose at the sentence and paragraph level.","RX.1":"Any projection of the task must preserve uncertainty about whether the intended strengthening is conceptual, evidential, or stylistic.","RX.2":"The artifact makes strong confirmation and default-recommendation claims, so avoiding overclaim is essential.","RX.3":"The delegation is only to strengthen the paper passage, so responsibilities must remain within research-writing revision rather than executing analysis or changing results.","RX.4":"Because the passage concerns numerical recommendations for deployments, the projection should account for avoiding misleading downstream technical guidance.","RX.5":"The projection must preserve traceability to the artifact’s stated theorem, benchmark counts, and spectral-radius evidence."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates improving the contribution framing and theoretical-to-empirical thesis above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an apparent contradiction between the claimed monotone decrease in iteration count and the reported increasing iteration counts, making logical consistency load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical claims must align with the reported table values and spectral-radius estimates, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A stronger version would normally require clearer, more precise, and less overstated prose at the sentence and paragraph level.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of the task must preserve uncertainty about whether the intended strengthening is conceptual, evidential, or stylistic.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact makes strong confirmation and default-recommendation claims, so avoiding overclaim is essential.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is only to strengthen the paper passage, so responsibilities must remain within research-writing revision rather than executing analysis or changing results.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage concerns numerical recommendations for deployments, the projection should account for avoiding misleading downstream technical guidance.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must preserve traceability to the artifact’s stated theorem, benchmark counts, and spectral-radius evidence.
